payload.answer: I can’t determine which AI-memory articles you’ve saved because no saved-article metadata or titles are present in the provided records.

entity_resolution.reason: The provided record excerpt does not include any explicit list or titles of articles that were saved about AI memory.

details: No article titles/IDs were included in the provided input.
Only high-level categories of records were mentioned, not the contents needed to answer the query.

repair_options: Provide the list of saved articles/titles (or the storage key/index) for the AI-memory topic.
Share any snippet from the memory system that enumerates saved items or article IDs relevant to AI memory.
Tell me where Brain stores “saved articles” (e.g., collection name, database/table, or export) so I can query it.
